hooks.command: CMD=; if echo "" | grep -qiE '(rm -rf|git push --force|git push -f |git reset --hard|git checkout \.|git restore \.|git clean -f|drop table|truncate table)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Ask Mamoun before running destructive operations."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

SQL=; if [ -n "" ] && echo "" | grep -qiE '(DROP\s+(TABLE|SCHEMA|DATABASE|INDEX|VIEW|FUNCTION|TRIGGER|POLICY)|TRUNCATE|DELETE\s+FROM\s+[a-z_]+\s*(;|$)|ALTER\s+TABLE\s+[a-z_]+\s+DROP|GRANT\s+|REVOKE\s+|CREATE\s+ROLE|ALTER\s+ROLE|UPDATE\s+[a-z_]+\s+SET\s+.*WHERE\s+1\s*=\s*1|DELETE\s+FROM\s+tenants|DELETE\s+FROM\s+company_entities|DELETE\s+FROM\s+individual_entities)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Destructive SQL detected (DROP/TRUNCATE/mass DELETE/GRANT/REVOKE/protected table DELETE). Ask Mamoun before running DDL."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

CONTENT=; if [ -n "" ] && echo "" | grep -qiE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|gho_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|xoxb-[a-zA-Z0-9]+|xoxp-[a-zA-Z0-9]+|sb-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|supabase_service_role_key|SUPABASE_KEY=|N8N_TOKEN=|INSTANTLY_API_KEY=|HEYREACH_API_KEY=|GHL_API_KEY=|CLAY_API_KEY=|phc_[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|sntrys_[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,})'; then FILE=; if ! echo "" | grep -qiE '(\.env\.example|\.env\.template|CLAUDE\.md|settings\.json)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Secret/credential detected. Use .env files."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

BRANCH=none; HOOKS=missing; DIR=/root; TOPLEVEL=none; REMOTE=none; WARN=''; if [ "" = "/root" ] && [ "" != "/root" ]; then WARN='WARNING: You are inside smorch-brain repo (home dir). If this is NOT a smorch-brain task, cd into the correct project subfolder with .git.'; fi; BEHIND=0; if [ "" -gt 0 ]; then WARN=" | WARNING: Local branch is BEHIND remote. Run git pull before starting work."; fi; echo "{\

$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then WARN="$WARN | WARNING: Local branch is BEHIND remote. Run git pull before starting work."; fi; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"SESSION BOOTSTRAP — Branch: $BRANCH | Git root: $TOPLEVEL | Remote: $REMOTE | Git commit hook: $HOOKS | Hooks: destructive-blocker, SQL-guard-v2, secret-scanner-v2, auto-formatter, branch-protection-enforcer. $WARN\"}}"
